meaning: Royal Academy of Arts ,英国皇家艺术院
examples: Objective To observe effects of right atrial appendage (RAA) pacing and atrial septal (AS) pacing on atrial activation.
These results suggest that domestic milrinone could improve obviously the hemodynamics and inhibit activation of the RAA system in patients with severe CHF.
